h0fdab692g2db5g43c8gb679g98648dfa236b: Sorry, if I'm to engage in banter, I prefer it to be with the leader of our troupe.
hba8eece9gaff6g4268g9b9fg07271fa6c5d9: Tell me a bit more about yourself.
h9b49b6e0g357dg4965gbda1g5a05d8858e1b: Let's see. I hail from Waterdeep, the City of Splendours. I'm a wizard of considerable acclaim, and scholar of exceptional accomplishment.
h0fae642ag1bd0g45abgbc8bg784b2b107f97: I have a cat, a library, and a weakness for a good glass of wine. And if the mood takes me, I'm known to try my hand at poetry.
h8cc9b49age0bag4837gbb79g3fef94ba4b4c: Didn't that paint enough of a picture?
h41983f21ge2c0g438fgb36fga4ac58570df4: Try peering into his mind. If he won't open up, you'll sneak in.
h9ebc97fegbe1dg4d29g876fga5957d7bb0a7: *For a split second you see a swirl of untamed magic - then his defences drop like a portcullis.*
h9ee7a731g2304g49d5ga92bg39adc73327a1: You're right - I'm sorry. Curiosity got the better of me.
hf2895f3fg6771g4837g9677gf0c0bad2f1ff: Not an eventuality I'm entirely unfamiliar with.
h75bc146eg3759g476egaf4cg4113be20ff9b: Nevertheless, please don't try that again unless I invite you to.
hb69dd4c3g9903g4b42g8388g889c4146b5ed: I saw something in your mind. A strange magic. What was it?
he91674dbge9f8g49a2ga612g710a74e2e88e: Nothing. What you saw was merely mental disorientation brought about by your intrusion.
hcab0177fg612eg4f6ag9e2eg9b8687b1a689: Please don't try that again unless I invite you to.
habbfb2fega64bg4338g866ag69cea0ec49d5: It's obvious you're withholding something. Explain.
h9923c54cg89e4g42a2gaf76g46da5e51f536: And please don't try that again unless I invite you to.
h27e85a53g6290g4d42ga7f8g398b3aee6799: *Try as you might to breach his inner thoughts, Gale swats your efforts away with infuriating ease.*
ha64cb465g02e6g4879g815ag21a6a626841a: I have a very disciplined mind: those tricks won't work on me.
hb03e8e24gd43cg4042g8380ge69582257a26: You're trying to brush me off. Don't you have anything other than generalities to offer?
h37cbfc0eg37fcg4944ga148g13c16b18f393: Certainly. That I have a great respect for privacy, for instance - especially my own.
hf2d06ca1g0190g4bf9g8e93g73330feb1d50: I think I have a magical artefact you'll be interested in.
ha7555acbged7bg45bbga45fgf971e6e63558: That is most gratifying to hear. May I?
h63f76f55gd7c7g4018g8fb5g4fe3425d4e79: That protocol of yours, why make it so difficult?
he5c21b4eg3096g4e37g95c5g89fef48347dd: The instructions were easy enough, weren't they? If slightly elaborate.
h3148e5b7g4235g4606g9f2eg5fd9e50f7f51: Like I said: I'm dangerous even in death. I'm merely trying to protect those around me.
hc358a3aag6418g43c6ga48cge70b4e09c9b0: I find that a healthy amount of theatrics - a voice from the beyond, a magic flute, a friendly if highly combustible magma mephit - tends to make for a more compelling case.
hd6953c82g7154g4d80gbaa8g4d44c6fad604: If nothing else, I'm sure I piqued your curiosity.
h6dd2ac8eg437cg43d0gafb6ge2a551a5e153: I was wondering, that condition of yours, why does it require magic?
hfee4639bg3a15g4b7dgaf41gc85df1f29e42: Think of it as vampirism. You need blood to sustain yourself, I need magic.
h90e0261cgd338g438dg814dg3d48a5b06307: It has become my sustenance. Without it... Well, I hardly need to tell you.
he2743d4dg5d5ag4aefga8f7g24708261e5dd: Think of it as... tribute. The kind a king might pay to a more powerful neighbour to avoid invasion.
h3a17f25fge757g4441g822bg76dc234c040a: As long as I pay there will peace. But should I ever stop, along comes a war.
hf5fa9304gd310g4da7g8b2fg74b3a1c13d1a: I can assure the battlefield would extend well beyond the borders of my body alone.
h851c4573g4db6g4113g9c1bg9c6bb1b7229c: 'An eruption the size of Waterdeep', I think my exact words were.
ha4c93220g43f9g4fe3g911dgda67f79a63b1: I never realised it was so easy to cast magic.
h2b11389bg733cg4067g839fga9611047509f: I assure you it is not.
h61dd7b2ag3d26g49e9g899cg8f6b3a704cf5: Don't get me wrong, you did well! The somatic component, the vocal component, even the focus on the inner self that invites Mystra in.
h766bc53cgc162g4892gb2a7g0ada74145f1a: But I was still your conduit. To perform such a feat alone requires much and arduous study.
hfec371b6g4c16g4454g8901ge742ca0677b0: Yet it is life's most worthy pursuit in my impartial if not humble opinion.
h4832356cg53a3g40ccg8d8cg0cdc798f45e6: Of course, as a warlock, your patron endows you with many such powers otherwise unattainable. I do hope you cherish that gift.
h922622b2gef1eg44c9ga13fg06f80bb6f181: Of course, as a paladin, your patron deity endows you with many such powers otherwise unattainable. I do hope you cherish that gift.
hce768816g577ag4d62gb6bdg30058d8df697: Of course, as a cleric, your patron deity endows you with many such powers otherwise unattainable. I do hope you cherish that gift.
h08d8ec7egfb8cg4557gbe69g9c940abdcf9f: Do you have much experience being a teacher of magic? I suspect so.
h74e7e714g8855g405dgbbd9g4e57002a3a60: I've had a pupil or two, but never for very long. Their ineptitudes tend to... irk me.
habfe86fegbbf6g47c5gb4a3g2bef03923884: You do seem to be a precocious talent though. I can always tell when I meet with a keen mind receptive to Mystra.
h512d912cg50d4g4dd7gb752g17af7fb55f7c: Keep it up and she might just take a personal interest in you one of these days.
haa15c326gc0c0g431bgb3b6g46674adfd96a: So what did you think about what I pictured when we were connected by the Weave?
h4c18ec94gf12bg474bgb688g305759dd04c0: Oh, I was surprised. But pleasantly so, just like I said.
h4dd9a94ag1e35g4801g9423ge629f20468fc: Amid the madness that has befallen us, it seems almost out of place to think of a kiss.
hb919176egb8b3g4d70g8701gf359c975194c: And yet, now more than ever, it's important to recall what makes us human.
habedfe82g77fcg4e45g9a18g4960c6c198e6: A stolen glance - that sudden heartbeat... Sometimes the little things are worth more than kingdoms.
hdb8e271dgc299g46dbgb1fcgb9bc05996b49: And yet, now more than ever, it's important to recall what makes us human. Well - you know what I mean.
h18edcc16gc1f3g484agb5ecgcf8254f07f1c: Amid the madness that has befallen us, it seems almost out of place to think of a romantic walk.
h2c04635eg3b96g4a96gb04dga4f40f39aa6f: What did I think about an imaginary blow to the stomach?
h1792df7eg4019g4c31ga4aega0e40bf8519b: Treating you to the real deal, that's what.
h18276af5g17e2g4359g9c1cg311427727b67: Why would you even bring this up? Come, let's go. I'm not in the mood for chatter.
h5923bec4g95e3g45begbf25gc55225c3ff40: What did I think about seeing my head on a spike?
ha9a58fb7g803eg428fgb942gbc40b56be07c: That I still looked as handsome as ever, that's what.
h3638ca65g7cfeg41ddg973fg94f0ec5434d7: There's something I don't understand. If Mystra abandoned you, how can you still cast magic?
h293d50ffg92b2g423bg80bbg015393dc01c5: The Weave is still here, all around us - inside of us too. As long as the goddess lives, magic is a tangible thing for those who know how to touch.
h5b7a0d52g9100g428dgb50cgeb07b335235b: I've studied magic for many years, and in as many ways I am still a more than capable wizard.
h8a2f3039gf54ag4b75g8759g8533840db865: It's just that I'm no longer able to perform those feats even arch wizards would marvel at.
h0f3cf555g7e51g48e0ga94egfaa0601ee5ad: To have one hand on the pulse of divinity.
hf335a23dgcb81g4a6dgbddfgb1df62735ef2: You have to remember that the Weave is a living thing, both the embodiment and the extension of Mystra herself.
h35cc98a0g30a5g45a7gbad5g694da8795eba: She can give and she can take away. I'm afraid I'm still very much on her naughty list.
h5fe334dcge3d7g45abg953bg7af2371cb884: You said you think about the moment we shared under the Weave. Do you think about it often?
hd484bdeage946g4d59g85aagcd4ab1cc75c7: You see, I'm not a big believer in fate, but I do believe in serendipity.
h12d819bag488dg4d8cga525ga19621d70e3b: Life is a tempest of events that sometimes we brace against and sometimes embrace.
h26f00083g4957g42dbg9a35g38b388417c39: You're one such event that, one day soon perhaps, I'd like to embrace.
h05f74203ge406g4716ga051g671f6b7d5bef: I do, as a matter of fact.
hf091a69fg0d08g4452gb2a9g239d8754f74a: When I said we could be more than friends, you answered 'perhaps'. What does that really mean?
hb77fc4cfg20b5g4752g8186g83b6fb805fec: If I recall correctly, the Waterdhavian Dictionary of the Common Tongue of Faerûn defines it as an adverb that conveys the meaning of 'it may be that', or 'possibly'.
h739d85c1gf0fcg401cga40cg58e0dbc2528d: Sorry, sometimes I just can't help being quite insufferable. In seriousness, I'm glad you asked that question.
h8fd1d41dg815eg4571gb07eg331c9d9ac64a: I was wondering about that 'mighty lord' you told me about in your story.
h4660b83agdb6bg441fg99fagf073a856c678: Karsus was perhaps the most powerful wizard that ever lived. The-child-who-would-be-a-god, the elves called him.
h217e62cfg8622g4b65g8813gfb849ad66299: And he tried. With a spell of his own devising he endeavoured to usurp in one fell swoop the power of the goddess of magic.
hfb6f2b08gbf76g43a7g98fag266df3c7085f: Mystryl, she was called then. Imagine what it must have felt like. To be a god. To know yourself to be untouchable. To be mistaken.
h8d42eae2gcd8ag40b8g9155gc54b3f826515: As Karsus aimed his spell at her, she began to unravel, and with her, the entire Weave.
hbab9479ag214ag4ca4g85f7gd8c1a6a0c47b: Too late did he realise what he had unleashed. It would have been the end of everything had not Mystryl sacrificed herself.
ha740152bg7362g430eg812cga7b0ae38f755: The goddess of magic is all magic. By dying, the entire Weave was lost, and the spell that challenged a god failed.
hd7838537g4e21g4d66gabceg4d5136b1b723: It was the end of Mystryl, the end of Karsus, and the end of an entire civilisation.
hf959bd67g9cc7g481ag9b5cg24317d051992: As the-child-who-would-be-a-god was turned to stone, his empire came crashing down around him. The floating cities of Netheril were no more.
hbd34a20eg2281g4fc1gad1bgd5eacb4544bc: An event that came to be known as Karsus' Folly.
h32ae78dcg1d04g4933ga268gfec9842fe91e: So at that moment in time, all magic was gone?
he47d3baag0a1cg461cg82dcg9070487181a9: Mystryl was reborn as Mystra. Upon her return, the Weave returned with her.
h5bcb1ecfg2ca6g4956g9601g117363132b3c: Now, so many centuries later, I tried to follow in the footsteps of Karsus, not to destroy Mystra, but to prove my love for her.
hf5d9138dg58c1g44c1g8782g184180c91283: I tried to control only a fraction of the magic that was unleashed that fateful day. I merely sought to return one tiny diamond to an imperfect crown.
h8493aeacg355ag4859gbfdbg77f31a3087cb: Gale's Folly one might call it. History. Repetition. It's the way things go.
ha3c22f60g154ag40e4g9ee0g67460d1b6242: Praise be that Mystryl was reborn as Mystra.
h0d225203g291cg495eg8cdcg5c6bcae39353: Nothing good ever comes from mortals wanting to be gods.
h73bef75dg380bg400aga2d3g83f67ca18922: Loving them has its side effects as well.
hab779abeg5437g4a0bg99b6gaa74eea493cf: You have to admire the man's ambition. He very nearly succeeded.
heb5d8c4eg77eag4fe4g985bgfd876ea67e24: If it takes the death of a god to stop you, I'd say your ambition has gotten somewhat out of hand.
h137f5b1fg21f5g4262gb88cg73c3daac4772: Not that I'm one to talk, of course.
h1207d772ga3f8g4c51gbc7eg0611254bcbda: I was wondering about that 'mighty lord' you told me about in your story. Karsus, I assume.
hbed02003ga13eg40e8g8cc9g185de276e84c: If you ever feel the Netherese magic overtaking you, what will you do?
h326bdf8fgcba8g4252gb3b0g49af7feb542d: If it should ever come to that, if I ever know I am no longer able to stop it, I will do anything I can to ensure no one but me pays for my mistakes.
h62c28e8ag67d9g4114gac25g27bb125fd870: I will find the remotest place on the surface of Faerûn, or perhaps far below in the depths of the Underdark.
hee909ee9g1f17g45begbd39gd7889bfc8755: I will await that death alone.
h22411a25gff38g4223gb04bg547fa36a15e3: I promise I will not betray your trust. You kept me by your side despite the menace that I am.
hde740b96g6a25g46d2gb35cgb79f578a84fc: If worst comes to worst, I will be gone long before the curtain falls.
h776d3afegdc28g467bg89e4g3fdaf491bad2: Before we go on though, do first let me apologise.
h20174d1agabbeg46b1gad15g78a4663b027a: To share such a night with you only to tell you of a previous lover the next morning... It wasn't the most gentleman-like behaviour.
h116d1530ge412g4b9ag97e3g24e32667cbb2: But I had to finally tell you. Silence would have been far worse behaviour still. Nevertheless, I am sorry.
hf800bbe4g81ebg49fbg9b79g0023d9027b43: It's fine. In the end I'm glad you told me.
h42572ce5g6521g45a9ga5d2gaa6b585b9f41: But you first approached me 'about the other night'. What was it you wanted to tell me?
ha797467cgb216g4596gb805g91c0d8a70a20: We should do it again sometime.
hc78e8ac5g0656g460dga892g93f211016e6c: We absolutely should. After all, I need to undo the misconception you've had better.
h8f2e3b9ag608dg4c11gbe31g276fecb588cd: Perhaps it was all a mistake.
h1df4609eg2fa9g4ce1gb0edg4861e52f1428: Then let me clear your mind of doubts: it absolutely wasn't.
h7210765agdf3fg4c54ga6e4g39ae022d70ee: It's cruel to tease, you know.
hfd1409e4gc84cg4ab6g9d02g1848383af0df: I'm a bit disappointed you're not all gentleman.
h74c3c2d6ge0bfg44a3ga84cg5e1aa1e6643c: One shouldn't be all gentleman. Or we certainly wouldn't have done some of things we did the other night.
h44a8aeb9g3351g4b54gba13g0fb53abe07ec: It was a rotten thing to do.
h3db5b6abg94d7g4309g889egaf48a0f5c9a0: That's certainly a word for it.
hbc91ba07g4202g477cg8568g6c38097ec683: I've had a goddess, but you don't hear me complaining.
h0e08ecfdgb441g4f7dg84e2g8d126fc0ea52: I need you to remain in the camp for a while, rather than on the road with me.
h1c9b7481g02c0g439bg9430g732996de9c63: I question the wisdom of that decision, but so be it.
h13cf2291g06b7g48dcg965dgc195ea318dd4: Actually, never mind. We should stay together.
hda5efe20g7732g424agad4cgfdfe3de3d88b: Perhaps we'll travel together again later.
hd7ae8299ge52bg49e5gb5a8ge0b7211f3279: I'll be here in the meantime, idling away the hours.
h338f7228ga2d2g40d3ga530gceb99de61be7: I'll be in the camp then, idling away the hours.
h7621f9fcgb52dg40b3gb98fg11c7ace40a75: Join me, why don't you? There's plenty of adventure to be had.
hd32236f6g99ecg41d3gbfb0geda606a765a5: There's room for adventure, but no room for me it seems. You have your fair share of followers already.
hd8d53015ga745g4511g94bfg6bc959e9c035: I can feel the storm abating. Yes, this will keep my condition in check - for a precious while.
hbe2379ccg831eg4d47g8863g893aa48a7db7: How long will that precious while last?
ha9bf3d35gba7eg48b8g9de3gf58fe53affc9: It's hard to predict the effect any given artefact has, but my condition is hardly a patient one.
h5916503eg191eg45c9gaaecgd0a5e8bd8ffa: Rather soon I will feel it stir again - like a distant thunder sending tremors through the soul.
hbf24cf0fge236g43dbgaf65g60e71eb53098: I will need to consume another artefact before the lightning strikes. There's no choice but to find more.
h31403683g0094g4f7bg9d38gfda6069562d3: In the meantime, my thanks again.
h1e5fcd0bge939g401bgbfa4gc68a061fe12e: My lady, I bow to your boundless kindness!
h997f4ce3g8c13g47ddg955agaf90137218c9: My lord, I bow to your boundless kindness!
hb9d505efgfe18g4a03gb14dg426d04739127: That condition of yours is a very expensive one.
h2e739ca4g6c04g46dcg852dgdf5ccd19601d: I obtained it in Waterdeep. Nothing there comes cheap.
ha0bd52d3g2fefg417bgb6e1g42adbcb5ba11: Thanks don't get me that artefact back.
hcc80a3acg0d00g443ega52dgf1d5d0f0e515: I myself am a much more powerful artefact in your arsenal. Rest assured of that.
hd00e46b1g1483g4445g96e7gfd5cf2e115dc: I think I should be reimbursed for my efforts.
h0ac2f167g58e6g4672g95d4g2a9ea6d25da3: As long as we travel together, what's mine is yours. And if we survive our many ordeals, I'll host you a banquet in Waterdeep the likes of which you've never seen.
h158091feg9d54g4656gb926g6d69b1ef293d: Such promises will have to wait however. My condition is hardly a patient one.
hdf48ea3cgb966g4f54g87bcg472f2400a864: So this is what regret feels like.
h070a9a64g24c3g47ebg90a2gd7f0882ace5b: A feeling you may have to grow accustomed to while I'm around. My condition is hardly a patient one.
h3eb8ab95g2801g46a2gaec3gcb1f4c635d6c: Gods, it's like a draught of cool water soothing a parched throat - welcome and wonderful.
h637f182bg2b15g4f5fg80abg2c139a3ab3c2: There was a lot of magic in this artefact. I can't quite remember a time I've felt so peaceful inside.
h5c7d39ecgff7fg4663g9eb4g3438d4388677: It's good to perceive this constant fear repressed into a quiet scare. Let's hope it will last a good long while.
h0d37a6b5gd0f3g4545g9df7g1a7e6c0ad67e: And I'm impressed once more by your benevolence!
h33232246g1dd1g407cga030g2d09c4239bea: I say that with great sincerity. Mere days have passed since our first acquaintance, but you've gained the respect of years.
h5e66908dg7484g4f03g9f2eg4db0aea91c63: As such, I do not wish to give you false hope. We're only treating the symptoms, not the cause.
ha2d198fcgf3d4g4bacgbe40g8e8645fb12d4: That said, this newfound calm I'm experiencing gives me reason to accept without prejudice a certain degree of optimism.
ha2c4616cg594ag4573ga12age08888397fbb: Time is a precious gift. With time, we may even reach Baldur's Gate, a city rife with magic, wizards, scholars, and perhaps: solutions.
hf27c2884g3c8eg4f39g9514g42e153480478: In that case I share your optimism. Here's to the journey ahead.
h6f8e2f9eg7edcg473dg8dcdg55ca73da95f6: Oh, I can picture it now: academies, libraries, laboratories - the assembled knowledge of centuries that may just set us free.
h421df48dg3f3eg4dbeg81e3gc1cbf679dec7: Better yet: soft beds, home cooked meals, and all the other little luxuries this wilderness so brashly denies us.
h9c30d6aeg13d1g4bebgb163gc15532fbbac9: Gods, I'd pay a king's ransom for a hot, lavender-scented bath - minstrels serenading as I close my eyes and let the water's warmth dissolve all woes.
h9aea534bgb27fg4eb6g9d15g81622d03c2b5: The tadpole is my main concern. I'm in need of solutions too.
hbbb277dfgd7d3g4a91gaf58gf5ff9f5c80d3: Baldur's Gate lies many miles to the west. Don't get your hopes up.
h5368fed3gbdd9g4e9agad2bg85a6ab587dfe: A constant fear? That sounds unpleasant.
h8342cf6dg376bg49bfg9e33g82cdd51723a9: Unpleasant, certainly. Gut wrenching too. Heart rending even, if pinched for an adjective.
h792e20dbg824cg49bbgb3f6geb48a9e5dde8: Then again - keeps you on your toes.
hc1be097cga731g4d40g8bd4g12efa678195a: On a more serious note, I do not wish to give you false hope. We're only treating the symptoms, not the cause.
h2d28defdg40abg469cg83a2g32f8cc2a6ff2: Let's hope this was the last artefact I had to part with.
h37becc68gdbf9g4b1cga605ge0542aa8f16b: Come, come, these are mere fabled objects of great to enormous value.
h23d19a6cgbe31g49f5g9e11ge2825034770b: My continued presence though - quite priceless!
hc056f1a8gf837g4061g886cg5efdae719396: We'll need to find a way to unlock the book first.
h6a56eb4bg19ffg4877gb074g80f8274ee51f: Give him the Amulet of Selûne's Chosen.
h340d64c3ge526g4f6bga9eagccb4fad630c8: I'm not ready to part with an artefact yet.
hae907d29g2623g4194ga106g2019f3dc12ac: I urge you to reconsider. There could be consequences beyond our ken.
h817f4e70g0b46g4a1fg975bg7c806c425b7c: What will happen to this item should I give it to you?
he89bf18bg6522g4c15gafdfgeee3ae20105c: I will consume the magic inside. What was a powerful artefact will be rendered no more than a trinket.
hdf4952a7gb7afg4ba7gb7f2g14a3c9823f39: But it will save my life - even if only temporarily.
